functional_requirements.text: Users must be able to upload requirement documents in PDF, DOCX, and TXT formats.
The system must extract plain text from uploaded documents and store it per document.
Users must be able to create and manage projects to organise separate requirements efforts.
The system must generate Functional Specifications from extracted requirements.
The system must generate Technical Specifications based on the functional specification.

non_functional_requirements.text: The system must support concurrent document processing without performance degradation.
Generated specifications must be versioned and retained for historical comparison.

constraints.text: The system must not expose LLM API keys in frontend network requests.
constraints.source_reference: Never expose API key in frontend

constraints.text: File uploads are limited to PDF, DOCX, and TXT formats only.

assumptions.text: Users are authenticated business analysts or engineering leads with domain knowledge.
A stable internet connection is available for LLM API calls.

stakeholders.text: Business Analysts and Product Managers — primary consumers of Functional Specs and User Stories.
Engineering Leads — primary consumers of Technical Specifications.
